completion_summary: Added and registered typed categorical GP-PI, GP-UCB, and RF-EI variants; manifest-gated all formal acquisition candidates, retained ordinal variants for compatibility only, and updated the nonclaiming method audit. notes: Migrated to the wf-110 authorization prefix because the task owns a shared configs/benchmark path.
scope: Add typed categorical material encodings to GP-PI, GP-UCB, and RF-EI variants, register them as candidate classic baselines, and update method eligibility controls without running formal pre-freeze comparisons.
